scripts.build: npm run build -w @hydra-ws/core && npm run build -w @hydra-ws/market-config && npm run build -w @hydra-ws/adapters-alpaca && npm run build -w @hydra-ws/hydra-connector && npm run build -w @hydra-ws/anchoring && npm run build -w @hydra-ws/sdk && npm run build -w engine-server && npm run build -w anchoring-server && npm run build -w web
